_comment: v6 BX schema (2026-04-26) — captures the REAL game via Playwright. Local http-server serves www/ at localhost:8765 (Capacitor web layer, no deployed URL). State seeding deferred until BX dev hooks land (mody-sahariar1/Bloxplode-Beta #72-#76). For now, captures naturally-reachable states only. BX boots with splash + menu fade-in (~3-4s) — initial settle is long.

deferred_until_dev_hooks.comment: Once mody-sahariar1/Bloxplode-Beta #72 (capture mode) lands, add: 04-classic-combo (seeded x4 combo + score 915 + best 5180), 05-adventure-themed (cyan Level 2 + progress 100/355 + gems), 06-best-score (gold crown + 185), 07-revive (countdown 3 + Revive/Skip pills)
